retired.title: Retired Player
retired.body: {{name}} has ended their career. Stats and achievements remain available on the public link. You can reset this player at any time to free up the slot.

card.copy_success_desc: Share it with a manager to receive offers.

primary_pos.title: Change Primary Position
primary_pos.first_free_hint: First change is free. Subsequent changes cost {{cost}}.
primary_pos.dialog_desc_free: First primary position change is FREE. Subsequent ones will cost {{cost}}.
primary_pos.secondary_will_clear: Your current secondary position ({{pos}}) will be removed.
primary_pos.toast_same_position: Pick a position different from the current one.
primary_pos.toast_insufficient: Not enough balance to change primary position.
primary_pos.toast_success_free: Primary position changed to {{pos}}! (1st change free)

secondary_pos.title: Secondary Position
secondary_pos.hint: Choose a secondary position so the manager can field you there.
secondary_pos.choose_button: Choose Secondary Position — Free for now
secondary_pos.dialog_desc: Free for now! Pick any secondary position — current balance: {{balance}}.
secondary_pos.toast_insufficient: Not enough balance to change secondary position.

new_player.title: New Player
new_player.hint: Create a new player and switch between them at any time. Your current player will be kept.
new_player.dialog_desc: Creating a new player costs {{cost}}. The amount will be debited from the current player when the new athlete is created. Your current player will be kept and you can switch between them.
new_player.step_redirect: You'll be redirected to create a new player
new_player.step_charge: {{cost}} will be debited from {{name}} on creation
new_player.step_active: The new player will become the active one
new_player.step_switch: You'll be able to switch players at any time
new_player.toast_insufficient: Not enough balance to create a new player.

retire.title: Retire Player
retire.body: Your player is {{age}} years old. Retiring ends their career: they leave the current club, stop training, and no longer appear in markets or lineups. Stats are preserved and accessible from the public link.
retire.dialog_desc: Ending the career is a final decision. Stats remain preserved and visible on the player's public link.
retire.contract_with_club: Contract with the current club will be terminated
retire.contract_no_club: Contract with the current club (no club)
retire.step_plan: Weekly auto-training plan will be erased
retire.step_invisible: Player no longer shows up in markets, lineups or offers
retire.step_freeze: Attributes freeze at the current state (OVR {{ovr}})
retire.step_reset_later: You can reset later to free up the slot
retire.toast_success: Player retired. Your stats remain available on the public link.

reset.title: Reset Player
reset.body: Permanently deletes this player and goes back to onboarding to create a new one. Only allowed for players without a club.
reset.in_club: You're in a club. Leave the current club before resetting.
reset.dialog_desc_end: will be erased (attributes, training history, stats, balance). Then you'll be sent to onboarding to create a new player.
reset.toast_in_club: You can only reset a player without a club. Leave the current club first.
reset.toast_no_club_only: You can only reset a player without a club.
reset.toast_success: Player deleted. Create your new player!
